headline: Trump 🍊💥 YANKS Troops from Qatar Base Amid Iran DRAMA 🔥🇮🇷
text:
US 🦅🇺🇸 & UK 🍵🇬🇧 SIMPS pulling personnel from Al-Udeid 🛩️🏰 Qatar base like it's a BAD DATE 😩🚪 – 'precautionary measure' 👀🛡️ cuz DONALD TRUMP 🍊👨‍💼 is EYEING Iran nuke-out 💣🇮🇷 over their PROTEST SLAYFEST 🔪😵! 2,400+ DEMOS 💀🪦 WIPED by mullah thugs 🤬👹, kids included 😢👶 – HRANA spilling the BLOOD TEA ☕🩸 with 18K+ ARRESTED 🚔🔒 despite internet BLACKOUT 🌑📵!

Qatar gov CHILLING ❄️: 'We got this, protecting our THICC infra 🍑🏗️!' But UK embassy in Tehran SHUT 🔒🏛️ going REMOTE 💻📡, US Doha crew on HIGH ALERT 🚨🚫 no joyrides to base. IRAN AIRSPACE CLOSED 🚫✈️ from 2:45am to 8am ⏰🛑 – Air India 🛫🇮🇳 & Lufthansa 🛩️🇩🇪 REROUTING like dodging EX-GF drama 😤🌀, delays incoming ⏳💥!

TRUMP DADDY 🍊🤑 on Fox: 'Killings STOPPING 🚫💀, no EXECUTIONS planned ⚰️❌ – good sources from OTHER SIDE 👻📡!' But Iran FM Abbas Araghchi 😼🗣️ warns: 'Don't REPEAT June MISTAKE 💥🤦‍♂️ or get SAME FAILED RESULT 😂🍆!' No hangings for that 26yo dude 🪢🚫, 'OUT OF QUESTION' he claims 🤥. Trump: 'We WATCHIN' 👀🔍, no military off table YET ⏳⚔️!'

Al-Udeid BIGGEST US MID-EAST PAD 🏰🦅 with 10K Yanks + 100 Brits 🍟🇬🇧 – not MASS EXODUS like pre-Iran strike BUS FIESTA 🚌💨 last year, just SOME dipping out 👋. Iran SCREAMING 🗣️🇮🇷: 'US fabricating PRETEXT for INVASION 🤡💣!' Parliament boss: Attack us? Israel + US bases & ships LEGIT TARGETS 🎯🚀💥! Protests POPPED end-Dec 💥📈 over CRASHED rial 💸📉 & SKY-HIGH costs 🛒💸 – BIGGEST clerical SHAKEUP since '79 REVOLU 🔥🤘!

Amnesty 😤📜: 'MASS UNLAWFUL KILLS on EPIC SCALE 🩸⚖️!' UN peeps, RECOGNIZE these CRIMES 👮‍♂️🚫! Italy 🇮🇹 & Poland 🇵🇱 tell citizens GTFO Iran 🏃‍♂️💨, Germany 🇩🇪 warns NO-FLY Tehran ✈️🚫 over 'escalating CONFLICT & ANTI-AIR WEAPONS 🎮💣'. UK MoD MUM 🤐 'OPSEC' on troop pull. Saudi US mission: 'CAUTION MODE 🚨, skip military hangs 🏰❌!' Trump weighing STRONG ACTION ⚡🍊 if executions GO BRRRR 🪢😱 – WORLD HOLDING BREATH 😮🌍 as IRAN TENSIONS BOIL OVER like BAD KEBOB 🔥🍢! Qatar staying THICC on security 💪🏰, but is WW3 SIMMERING? 👀💥😂
